'''Chel Dorat''' was a [[Navy/Legends|naval]] [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] resident on [[Jerrilek]] and the father of [[Preela Dorat]]. Considered something of a strategic genius, Dorat served in both the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] and the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] before becoming disillusioned with the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], ultimately defecting to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. He went on to serve in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|defense fleet]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]].

==Biography==
Dorat served as a [[Captain/Legends|captain]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] in the final years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. Appalled by the inefficiency and corruption of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]], he became a stout supporter of [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and his plans to create a more efficient galactic government. With the establishment of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Dorat was admitted into the [[Imperial General Staff]] and achieved the rank of admiral.<ref name="Loyalties" />

[[File:Chel_and_Preela_Dorat.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Chel Dorat is confronted by his daughter.]]
Dorat eventually became appalled with the tyranny and oppressive methods of the Empire, which he openly opposed. However, whenever he attempted to protest, he was threatened back into silence. As a result, he retired to write his memoirs and work on a way to reform the Empire. This eventually led him to defect from the Empire and join the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]]. When his daughter [[Preela Dorat|Preela]] learned about this, she contacted the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]] and informed them about his plans. The ISB managed to capture him, but he was eventually rescued by Rebel operatives and taken to a secret Rebel base.<ref name="Loyalties" />

Chel Dorat later became admiral in the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Navy]]. He succeeded [[Voon Massa]] as the commander of the [[New Republic Fourth Fleet]] when Massa died at the [[Battle of Denon (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Denon]] in [[6 ABY/Legends|6 ABY]], and successfully penetrated the [[Colonies/Legends|Colonies]] with his fleet.<ref name="TEGTW" />
